data.module_description: The Doctor Service Domain implements a comprehensive clinical workflow system supporting doctor workbench functionality. The architecture follows a three-tier microservice pattern with API, Consumer (BFF), and Provider layers. The system provides AI-powered schedule recommendations (currently mock implementation with AI service integration placeholder), complete schedule lifecycle management from creation through completion with diagnostic report uploads, and multi-criteria appointment queries. Key technical features include: (1) Dubbo RPC for inter-service communication with Nacos service discovery, (2) MyBatis-Plus ORM with optimistic locking for concurrent update protection, (3) State machine workflow for schedule status transitions (PENDING → IN_PROGRESS → COMPLETED/CANCELLED), (4) Strict ownership validation ensuring doctors can only operate on their own schedules, and (5) Dual-layer security with role-based access control (DOCTOR role) and fine-grained permission checks (doctor:read, doctor:write).
data.interaction:
**REST API Interfaces (DoctorWorkbenchController):**
1. POST /doctor/workbench/schedule/generate - AI schedule generation with doctor:write permission
2. GET /doctor/workbench/schedule/list - Paginated schedule queries with doctor:read permission
3. GET /doctor/workbench/schedule/detail - Single schedule detail with ownership validation
4. POST /doctor/workbench/schedule/complete - Complete schedule with mandatory diagnosis report
5. POST /doctor/workbench/schedule/cancel - Cancel schedule with mandatory reason
6. POST /doctor/workbench/schedule/status - Update schedule status with state machine validation
7. GET /doctor/workbench/info - Get current doctor information

**Dubbo RPC Interface (DoctorWorkbenchAPI):**
- generateScheduleSuggestion(GenerateScheduleRequest) → GenerateScheduleResponse
- querySchedule(QueryScheduleRequest) → QueryScheduleResponse
- getScheduleDetail(Long scheduleId, Long doctorId) → GetScheduleDetailResponse
- completeSchedule(CompleteScheduleRequest) → CompleteScheduleResponse
- cancelSchedule(Long scheduleId, Long doctorId, String reason) → CancelScheduleResponse
- updateScheduleStatus(Long scheduleId, Long doctorId, String status) → UpdateScheduleStatusResponse
- getDoctorInfo(Long doctorId) → GetDoctorInfoResponse

**Security Model:**
- X-User-Id header injected by Gateway for user identity trust chain
- Class-level @RequireRole("DOCTOR") for role enforcement
- Method-level @RequirePermission for granular access control
- Business-level ownership validation in Provider layer preventing cross-doctor data access
data.implementation:
**Core Service Implementation (DoctorWorkbenchServiceImpl):**

1. **AI Schedule Generation:**
   - Validates doctor existence via DoctorMapper
   - Currently generates mock schedules (门诊, 查房, 会诊) with varying priorities
   - Returns List<ScheduleVO> with AI recommendation text
   - Designed for future AI service integration

2. **Schedule Query System:**
   - Uses LambdaQueryWrapper for dynamic query building
   - Supports filtering by doctorId, scheduleDay, status, scheduleCategory
   - Results ordered by priority DESC, createTime DESC
   - Converts entities to VOs with resolved enum descriptions and category names

3. **Schedule Completion Workflow:**
   - Four-step validation: existence check → ownership verification → status validation → report requirement
   - Diagnosis report mandatory; prescription and notes optional
   - Uses LambdaUpdateWrapper with version field for optimistic locking
   - Builds structured result combining diagnosis, prescription, and notes

4. **Schedule Cancellation:**
   - Validates ownership and current status (cannot cancel COMPLETED/CANCELLED)
   - Requires cancellation reason (stored in result field)
   - Applies optimistic locking for concurrent safety

5. **Status Transition State Machine:**
   - Valid transitions: PENDING → (IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, CANCELLED)
   - Valid transitions: IN_PROGRESS → (COMPLETED, CANCELLED)
   - Terminal states: COMPLETED and CANCELLED (no further transitions)
   - Supports idempotent same-status updates

**Data Layer:**
- DoctorMapper: BaseMapper<Doctor> for doctor profile CRUD
- DoctorScheduleMapper: BaseMapper<DoctorSchedule> for schedule CRUD
- ScheduleCategoryMapper: BaseMapper<ScheduleCategory> for category lookup

**Entity Design:**
- Doctor: ASSIGN_ID primary key, @Version optimistic lock, @TableLogic soft delete, JSON ext field
- DoctorSchedule: Priority (1-4), Status enum, version control, JSON ext for flexibility
- ScheduleCategory: AUTO_INCREMENT ID, name/alias/description, JSON ext for styling

**Configuration:**
- Provider: Port 8085, Dubbo 20885, MySQL chronic_care_doctor, Druid pool (5-20 connections)
- Consumer: Port 8086, Dubbo consumer with check=false and 30s timeout
- Both registered with Nacos at localhost:8848
data.flowchart_mermaid:
flowchart TD
    subgraph Client["Client Layer"]
        A[Doctor Workbench UI]
    end
    
    subgraph Gateway["API Gateway"]
        B[Gateway with JWT Validation]
        B1[X-User-Id Header Injection]
    end
    
    subgraph Consumer["Consumer Layer - BFF (Port 8086)"]
        C[DoctorWorkbenchController]
        C1[Role Check: DOCTOR]
        C2[Permission Check: doctor:read/write]
    end
    
    subgraph Provider["Provider Layer (Port 8085)"]
        D[DoctorWorkbenchServiceImpl]
        D1[Ownership Validation]
        D2[State Machine Validation]
        D3[Optimistic Lock Check]
    end
    
    subgraph DataLayer["Data Access Layer"]
        E1[DoctorMapper]
        E2[DoctorScheduleMapper]
        E3[ScheduleCategoryMapper]
    end
    
    subgraph Database["MySQL - chronic_care_doctor"]
        F1[(doctor)]
        F2[(doctor_schedule)]
        F3[(schedule_category)]
    end
    
    subgraph Registry["Service Registry"]
        G[Nacos Server :8848]
    end
    
    A -->|HTTP Request| B
    B -->|Inject User Identity| B1
    B1 -->|X-User-Id Header| C
    C -->|Validate Role| C1
    C1 -->|Validate Permission| C2
    C2 -->|Dubbo RPC| D
    D -->|Validate Owner| D1
    D1 -->|Validate Status| D2
    D2 -->|Check Version| D3
    D3 --> E1
    D3 --> E2
    D3 --> E3
    E1 --> F1
    E2 --> F2
    E3 --> F3
    
    Consumer -.->|Register/Discover| G
    Provider -.->|Register/Discover| G
data.sequence_diagram_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram autonumber participant UI as Doctor Workbench participant GW as API Gateway participant Ctrl as DoctorWorkbenchController participant Svc as DoctorWorkbenchServiceImpl participant DM as DoctorMapper participant SM as DoctorScheduleMapper participant CM as ScheduleCategoryMapper participant DB as MySQL Database Note over UI,DB: Schedule Completion Flow with Diagnosis Report UI->>GW: POST /doctor/workbench/schedule/complete
{scheduleId, diagnosisReport, prescription} GW->>GW: Validate JWT Token GW->>Ctrl: Forward Request + X-User-Id Header Ctrl->>Ctrl: @RequireRole("DOCTOR") Check Ctrl->>Ctrl: @RequirePermission("doctor:write") Check Ctrl->>Ctrl: Override doctorId with X-User-Id Ctrl->>Svc: Dubbo RPC: completeSchedule(request) Svc->>SM: selectById(scheduleId) SM->>DB: SELECT * FROM doctor_schedule WHERE id=? DB-->>SM: DoctorSchedule Entity SM-->>Svc: DoctorSchedule alt Schedule Not Found Svc-->>Ctrl: FAIL: "日程不存在" Ctrl-->>UI: Result.error("日程不存在") end Svc->>Svc: Ownership Validation:
schedule.doctorId == request.doctorId? alt Ownership Validation Failed Svc->>Svc: Log Security Warning Svc-->>Ctrl: FAIL: "无权操作该日程" Ctrl-->>UI: Result.error("无权操作该日程") end Svc->>Svc: Status Validation:
Not COMPLETED/CANCELLED? alt Invalid Status Svc-->>Ctrl: FAIL: "已完成/已取消的日程无法操作" Ctrl-->>UI: Result.error(message) end Svc->>Svc: Business Rule:
diagnosisReport not empty? alt Missing Diagnosis Report Svc-->>Ctrl: FAIL: "诊断报告不能为空" Ctrl-->>UI: Result.error("诊断报告不能为空") end Svc->>Svc: Build Result:
Diagnosis + Prescription + Notes Svc->>SM: update with LambdaUpdateWrapper
(version check for optimistic lock) SM->>DB: UPDATE doctor_schedule
SET status='COMPLETED', result=?
WHERE id=? AND version=? DB-->>SM: Affected Rows SM-->>Svc: Update Result alt Version Conflict (rows=0) Svc-->>Ctrl: FAIL: "请刷新后重试" Ctrl-->>UI: Result.error("请刷新后重试") end Svc->>SM: selectById(scheduleId) SM->>DB: SELECT updated schedule DB-->>SM: Updated Entity SM-->>Svc: DoctorSchedule Svc->>Svc: convertToVO(schedule) Svc->>CM: selectById(scheduleCategory) CM->>DB: SELECT category name DB-->>CM: ScheduleCategory CM-->>Svc: Category Name Svc-->>Ctrl: SUCCESS: CompleteScheduleResponse
{code, message, scheduleVO} Ctrl-->>UI: Result.success(response)
